'''yamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:otherly|otherly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:otherly|otherly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yamate|yamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yamatesher|yamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamatesherĂ«m|yamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yamatero|yamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yamateshĂ«|yamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamateshĂ«m|yamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyamatero|gokiyamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyamateshĂ«|gokiyamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamateshĂ«m|gokiyamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyamankerom|goyamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyamankeshĂ«|goyamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyamankeshĂ«m|goyamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyamankeya|goyamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yamaterom|yamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamatemu|yamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yamateya|yamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyamaterom|gokiyamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamatemu|gokiyamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyamateya|gokiyamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yamamate|yamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yamamatesher|yamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamamatesherĂ«m|yamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yamamatero|yamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yamamateshĂ«|yamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamamateshĂ«m|yamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyamamatero|gokiyamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyamamateshĂ«|gokiyamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamamateshĂ«m|gokiyamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyamamankerom|goyamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyamamankeshĂ«|goyamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyamamankeshĂ«m|goyamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyamamankeya|goyamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yamamaterom|yamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yamamatemu|yamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yamamateya|yamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyamamaterom|gokiyamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyamamatemu|gokiyamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyamamateya|gokiyamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠte|yĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠtesher|yĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠtero|yĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠmĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠmĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠmĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠterom|yĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠtemu|yĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠmĂŠteya|yĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠmĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠmĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafmafte|yafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafmaftesher|yafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafmaftesherĂ«m|yafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafmaftero|yafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafmafteshĂ«|yafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafmafteshĂ«m|yafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafmaftero|gokiyafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafmafteshĂ«|gokiyafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafmafteshĂ«m|gokiyafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafmafnkerom|goyafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafmafnkeshĂ«|goyafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafmafnkeshĂ«m|goyafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafmafnkeya|goyafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafmafterom|yafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafmaftemu|yafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafmafteya|yafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafmafterom|gokiyafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafmaftemu|gokiyafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafmafteya|gokiyafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
